name: image-storage-model
title: Image storage model: private files at rest + base64 Publish projection
description: Per ADR-0003: keep pasted images as Private files in the StackEdit private repo; never store base64; add a Copy-for-Publish action that emits text/plain raw Markdown with local /imgs refs inlined as base64 for manual paste into pdir. Blocked on the StackEdit fork (ADR-0001).
creator: Sakyvo
